description_long: This is a sleek, angular airplane with a dark, matte finish and a distinctive triangular, delta-shaped wing configuration. The wings are sharply swept back and blend smoothly into the fuselage, giving the aircraft a stealthy, futuristic appearance. The body is low-profile, with no visible external engines or landing gear, suggesting a streamlined design for high-speed flight. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a subtle canopy integrated into the body. The tail section features twin vertical stabilizers that are canted outward, enhancing the aircraft's aerodynamic profile. The overall design is reminiscent of advanced stealth or experimental military aircraft, with minimal surface features and a focus on reducing radar signature.
description: A dark, angular airplane with a delta wing, twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers, and a streamlined, stealthy appearance. The cockpit is forward and smoothly integrated into the fuselage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply pointed nose, wide delta wings, and twin vertical stabilizers canted outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the low-profile fuselage, swept-back wings, and the absence of visible engines or landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizes the twin vertical stabilizers and the broad, flat trailing edge of the delta wing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the sleek, continuous wing-fuselage blend and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, delta-shaped wings with sharp sweep and no visible winglets; wings blend smoothly into the fuselage.
attribute_engine_type: No visible external engines; likely internal jet configuration.
attribute_tail_design: Twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers in a V-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No landing gear visible in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated into the fuselage with a streamlined canopy.
